title: Vault: HTTP 429 maps to Backend instead of Unavailable
description:
## Problem
In secretx-hashicorp-vault/src/lib.rs, map_http_status() maps HTTP 429 Too Many Requests to SecretError::Backend (permanent). Vault returns 429 under rate-limit or leadership-redirect scenarios. Callers using retry-on-Unavailable will not retry.

## Expected behavior
HTTP 429 → SecretError::Unavailable (transient, callers should retry with backoff)

## Reference
GCP SM correctly maps 429 → Unavailable. Fix: add `|| status == 429` to the Unavailable branch in map_http_status() in secretx-hashicorp-vault/src/lib.rs.

## Acceptance
Unit test: map_http_status(429) returns Unavailable. cargo test -p secretx-hashicorp-vault passes.
